case_title: SANDOVAL, AIDA vs. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANDOVAL, AIDA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-27-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-29-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-07-1993

CORRES REC'D FROM ARB THAT AT ARB HRG ON 2/16/94 PHONE CALL FROM PLTF THAT DUE TO CALENDARING ERROR ARB WOULD NOT GO FORWARD. ARB IS RETURNING CASE TO COURT FOR DISPOSITION.
COURT ORDERED CASE BACK TO MR. WECHT, WHO AGREED TO CONDUCT ANOTHER ARB HEARING WITH A REASSIGNMENT PERIOD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO DEFT
